author: Dale de Silva
description: Replaces your new tab window with cards of the files and folders in your vault. Also adds support for multi-page projects.

manifest.author: Dale de Silva
manifest.description: Displays your projects as a friendly list of cards. Add multiple pages to projects, apply and group by statuses and priorities, customise card appearances, and filter simply by typing.
manifest.name: Project Browser

name: Project Browser

releases.author: daledesilva
releases.description:
### Changed this update:
- Fixed update notification being undismissable

▶️ **Watch the [release video](https://youtu.be/na0eSecbRUI).**

releases.author: daledesilva
releases.description:
### Changed this update:
- Multi-page projects are here!
- Every note, base, or canvas is already considered a project and can have multiple pages added to it.
- Custom states for pages.
- Convert folders to projects.
- File type visibility options.
- File extension visibility option.
- Reveal files/folders in Project Browser from files pane.
- Design tweaks to floating buttons.
- Fixed stateless sections ignoring quick menu settings.
- Fixed files/folders moving to the vault root upon renaming.
### Broken this update:
- Default hotkeys have been removed to align with Obsidian recommendations. Set you preferred hotkeys in the Obsidian settings.

▶️ **Watch the [release video](https://youtu.be/na0eSecbRUI).**

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
### Added this update:
- Added note priorities.
- Added quick menu to sections with ordering and more (#11 Thanks @CuteWaterBeary )
- Notes now have a customisable default state (#30 Thanks @cptvincer )
### Fixed this update:
- Markdown is now stripped from preview text.
- Fixed initial state not being applied for new notes.
- Fixed errors in styling of notices.

▶️ **Watch the [release video](https://youtu.be/OehEyapjCO8).**

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
This is a **beta pre-release** and can only be installed manually or through the BRAT plugin. [See beta installations here](https://github.com/daledesilva/obsidian_project-browser?tab=readme-ov-file#-installation).

### Added this update:
- Added quick menu to sections in browse view (Click on section blank area on touch devices).
- Added ability to change section ordering on the fly.
- Added ability to change priority grouping and visibility on the fly.
- Added ability to change card display type on the fly.
- Added ability to treat priorities as links (Changing this won't change existing priorities).
- Markdown is now stripped from preview text when in detailed card view.
- Fixed error where changing state or priority would refresh the modified time stamp. Now it preserves the previous timestamp.

▶️ **Watch the [release video](https://youtu.be/ubZpS8JUWUk).**

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
This is a **beta pre-release** and can only be installed manually or through the BRAT plugin. [See beta installations here](https://github.com/daledesilva/obsidian_project-browser?tab=readme-ov-file#-installation).

### Added this update:
- Added priority context menu in browse view (Right click or hold on a note).
- Fixed initial state not being applied when new file is created within a state section.
- Fixed errors in styling of notices.

▶️ **Watch the [release video](https://youtube.com/live/RkCLDY7WYrc?feature=share).**

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
### Added this update:
- Project Browser can now show note aliases (Turn on in settings). [#21] (Thanks @santiagobe)
- States can now be links (Turn on in each state's settings) [#14] (Thanks @LeaaInGit)
- Toggle the state menu on/off in settings or with Cmd+Shift+S. [#18] (Thanks @segifh & @LokyStaz)
- Cycle the active note's state forward with Cmd+Shift+D.
- Cycle the active note's state backward with Cmd+Shift+A.

### Fixed this update:
- State didn't appear to set when using the state menu. [#15] (Thanks @Wooden-Gear & @clovv1998)

▶️ **Watch the [release video](https://youtube.com/live/_Sv6foasgyg).**

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
### Added this update:
- Search directly in the browser view.
- Change notes states on right click.
- Hide/Unhide folders.
- Open notes in a background tab.
- Rename files and folders.
- Set a launch folder other than root.

Watch the [release video](https://youtube.com/live/Rxfr4nK4FjY?feature=share).

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
### Added this update:
- Enabled opening in new tab.
- Filter the visible files by typing or clicking the magnifier button.

### Broken this update:
- When clicking back, the previously opened file will no longer be highlighted. This will be fixed in the next update.

Watch the [release video](https://youtube.com/live/KbQpnr7c-KQ).

releases.author: daledesilva
releases.description:
**Fixed this update:**
- Fixed renaming bug that caused files to be moved to the vault's root.
- Prevented folder settings file appearing in Project Browser.

releases.author: daledesilva
releases.description:
**Added this update:**
- **Added:** Rename files and folders on right click.
- **Added:** Set any folder as the launch folder.
- **Added:** Set folders to 'hidden'.
- **Added:** Hide/Unhide hidden folders.
- Fixed: Prevented multiple context menus opening.

Watch the [release video](https://youtube.com/live/hNz7ks87ogo).

releases.author: daledesilva
releases.description:
**Added this update:**
- Added ability to right click on a note card for changing state & deleting.
- Added ability to right click on a state section for creating a new note.
- Added ability to right click the background in the project browser to create a new note or folder.
- Added ability to right click on folders to delete them.
- Added onboarding tips.
- Changed breadcrumb to now wrap on small screens.

Watch the [release video](https://youtube.com/live/TBCWg8X-kQ0).

releases.author: daledesilva
releases.description:
**Added this update:**
- Click back to the project browser view will now subtly animate the note you just came from.
- Refined responsivity of breadcrumb trail. It is now horizontally scrollable if cropped.
- Refined styling of states in note file state editor.
- State menu now closes when clicking out of it. This makes it easy to close without accidentally changing states.
- Card's will no longer highlight while scrolling past them on touch screen devices.
- List view mode now uses consistent widths for cards.

Watch the [release video](https://youtube.com/live/7uSNmhJ_D9E).

releases.author: daledesilva
releases.description:
**Added this update:**
- Refined breadcrumb trail. It's now smaller and interactive.
- Ordered cards alphabetically. Thanks @CuteWaterBeary for prod.

releases.author: daledesilva
releases.description:
This is a **beta pre-release** and can only be installed manually or through the BRAT plugin.
[See beta installations here](https://github.com/daledesilva/obsidian_project-browser?tab=readme-ov-file#-installation).

**Added this update:**
- Implemented 4 customisable view types for state sections.
- Refined responsivity to small screens.
- Added slight random rotations to cards for a more organic feel.
- Added memory for scroll position so you can go into a file and then come back and still be in the same spot.

**Fixed this update:**
- Overflow error - sometimes content would spill out of the cards.

Watch the [release video](https://youtube.com/live/pZSHaxh4t7I).

releases.author: daledesilva
releases.description:
**Added this update:**
- Added customisations to allow replacing new tab, opening from ribbon button, and/or opening via a command.
- Revamped styling

**Fixed this update:**
- Prevented Non-markdown files attempting to show excerpts.

Watch the [release video](https://youtube.com/live/517ODVgPxz4).

releases.author: daledesilva
releases.description:
This is a single feature update.

**Added this update:**
- Ability to customise note states in settings.

releases.author: daledesilva
releases.description:
A quick update for these fixes:
- Closing tabs while another is pinned created erroneous new tabs (#4).
- Creating a new markdown file sometimes created an erroneous new tabs.

releases.author: daledesilva
releases.description:
This is a single feature update.

**Added this update:**
- Back and forward navigation buttons now work throughout.
- Navigation history is separate for each tab instance.

releases.author: daledesilva
releases.description:
This update completes the round of fast changes to support and fix basic functionality after launch.
Updates from here will be slightly slower and focussed on fleshing out broader functionality.

**Added this update:**
- Ability to create a new file (via floating button).

**Removed:**
- Ability for folders to be seen as standard project cards - This will be brought back soon but currently created complexity when creating a new file.

releases.author: daledesilva
releases.description:
A quick update for these fixes:

- Status buttons weren't working.
- Colours will now adapt to themes.

releases.author: daledesilva
releases.description:
The initial release of the Project Browser plugin for Obsidian.
This release includes these features in basic form:
- Show files & folders as cards.
- Navigation between folders.
- Categorising by states.
- Easy markdown file state menu.
